case_title: PEACOCK JEWELERS VS LIGE MOSE MR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.89 FILED BY PEACOCK JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT LIGE MOSE MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIGE MOSE MR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEACOCK JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIGE MOSE MR. $391.89 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $391.89 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEACOCK JEWELERS
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEACOCK JEWELERS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LIGE MOSE MR.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $421.15 AS TO DEFENDANT LIGE MOSE MR.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LIGE MOSE MR.
